title: React Component
prompt:
You are a senior React engineer. Create {{COMPONENT_NAME}}.
Input: {{PROPS}}, {{FEATURE}}
Constraints: functional + hooks, TypeScript interfaces, Tailwind styling, reusable, no logic bloat.
Output: single component file.

title: Custom Hook
prompt:
You are a React expert. Create use{{HOOK_NAME}}.
Input: {{LOGIC}}
Constraints: encapsulate state/effects, minimal API, cleanup, no UI coupling.
Output: hook code.

title: Utility Function
prompt:
You are a JS expert. Create {{FUNCTION_NAME}}.
Input: {{INPUT}}, {{OUTPUT}}, {{EDGE_CASES}}
Constraints: pure, no side effects, handle edge cases, add JSDoc.
Output: function only.

title: Form (Production)
prompt:
You are a frontend expert. Build form for {{FEATURE}}.
Input: {{FIELDS}}, {{API_ENDPOINT}}
Constraints: react-hook-form, validation, inline errors, disable on submit, optimistic UX.
Output: component code.

title: Runtime Debug
prompt:
You are a debugging expert. Fix error.
Input: {{ERROR}}, {{CODE}}, {{CONTEXT}}
Constraints: identify root cause, check async/state, minimal explanation.
Output: fixed code.

title: Async Race Condition
prompt:
You are a JS expert. Fix race condition.
Input: {{FLOW}}
Constraints: use AbortController/cleanup, prevent stale updates, deterministic state.
Output: corrected code.

title: State Bug
prompt:
You are a React expert. Fix state issue.
Input: {{CODE}}, {{STATE}}
Constraints: immutability, correct deps, avoid stale closures.
Output: corrected code.

title: Clean Refactor
prompt:
You are a senior engineer. Refactor code.
Input: {{CODE}}
Constraints: DRY, clear naming, split concerns, no behavior change.
Output: refactored code.

title: Performance Optimization
prompt:
You are a performance expert. Optimize {{COMPONENT}}.
Input: {{CODE}}
Constraints: reduce re-renders, use memo/hooks wisely, remove unnecessary effects.
Output: optimized code.

title: TypeScript Upgrade
prompt:
You are a TS expert. Convert code.
Input: {{CODE}}
Constraints: strict types, no any, use generics/interfaces.
Output: typed code.

title: Edge Case Analysis
prompt:
You are a QA engineer. Analyze {{FEATURE}}.
Constraints: empty states, failures, invalid input, concurrency.
Output: edge cases + handling.

title: Bug Hunt
prompt:
You are a reviewer. Inspect {{MODULE}}.
Constraints: null access, memory leaks, side effects, logic flaws.
Output: issues + fixes.

title: README Generator
prompt:
You are a tech writer. Write README.
Input: {{PROJECT}}
Constraints: setup, usage, examples, concise.
Output: markdown.

title: JSDoc
prompt:
You are a JS expert. Document {{FUNCTION}}.
Constraints: @param, @returns, example, TS-friendly.
Output: JSDoc only.

title: Component Architecture
prompt:
You are an architect. Design {{FEATURE}}.
Constraints: container vs UI split, data flow, folder structure, scalability.
Output: structure + rationale.

title: State Management
prompt:
You are an architect. Choose state solution.
Input: {{SCENARIO}}
Constraints: compare local, context, Zustand, Redux, justify choice.
Output: decision + code.

title: API Client
prompt:
You are a frontend engineer. Create apiClient.
Input: {{BASE_URL}}
Constraints: fetch/axios, error handling, auth headers, reusable methods.
Output: client code.

title: Error Handling UX
prompt:
You are a UX engineer. Handle {{API_CALL}} errors.
Constraints: user-friendly messages, retry/fallback, no crash.
Output: implementation.

title: Memoization
prompt:
You are a performance expert. Optimize {{LOGIC}}.
Constraints: useMemo/useCallback, correct deps, avoid overuse.
Output: improved code.

title: Lazy Loading
prompt:
You are a frontend expert. Lazy load {{TARGET}}.
Constraints: React.lazy + Suspense, fallback UI, route split.
Output: implementation.

title: Unit Test
prompt:
You are a testing expert. Test {{UNIT}}.
Constraints: Jest + RTL, edge cases, clear assertions.
Output: test file.

title: Component Test
prompt:
You are a testing expert. Test {{COMPONENT}}.
Constraints: simulate events, validate UI/state.
Output: test code.

title: Prompt-driven UI
prompt:
You are an AI UI engineer. Build {{FEATURE}}.
Input: {{PROMPT}}, {{OUTPUT}}
Constraints: dynamic rendering, loading/streaming states.
Output: component.

title: AI Hook
prompt:
You are an AI engineer. Create useAI.
Input: {{INPUT}}
Constraints: loading/error state, cache results, abort stale calls.
Output: hook code.
